history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (>). The cell immediately to my right (C) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I need to go downward along column B to reach row 08, then go right to the goal at column H. To face down, I must turn right (clockwise) from my current orientation.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front of me (B03) is a floor tile. Moving forward will take me safely down column B, which eventually leads to row 08, from where I can turn and move right to the goal at H08. There is no immediate danger, so moving forward is the correct next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The cells directly below me in column B are all safe floor cells down to row 08. From row 08, I can turn right and move horizontally to the goal. Moving forward now is the safe and efficient next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing down. Below me is row 05 column B, a safe floor cell (`.`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The direct path downward along column B avoids all lava cells, and I can later go right along row 08 to reach the goal. I should move forward to start progressing downward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The cells directly ahead of me (row 06, column B and beyond) are safe floor, while lava blocks most other columns. The safest and most direct path to the goal is to move forward along column B to row 08, then turn right and proceed along row 08 to the goal. Therefore, the next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly ahead (row 07, column B) is safe floor, and continuing down

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front of me (row 07, column B) is floor (`.`), safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, which is at row 08, column H. After that, I can continue down and then right to reach the goal, avoiding all lava. So the best next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (B8) is empty and safe. Moving forward will put me on row 08, which is entirely clear of lava and walls up to the goal at H8. Once on row 08, I can then turn left to face right and proceed to the goal. Therefore, the best next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H, directly to my right. To move toward it, I need to face right (`>`). Turning counter-clockwise (TURN_LEFT) from down will orient me to the right. The cell in front after turning will be safe floor (C08).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 08 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H, directly to the east along a clear path of empty floor tiles. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. The cells in front of me in row 08 are all safe floor (`.`) until the goal. Moving forward will take me to column C, which is safe. Therefore, I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column C, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. The cells in front of me (row 08, columns D, E, F, G) are all safe floor (`.`). There is no obstacle, so I can move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column D facing right (>). The goal is at row 08, column H, directly to the right. The cells ahead are all safe floor (E, F, G) before the goal. I should move forward to get closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column F, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly in front of me is row 08, column G, which is a floor (`.`). Since it's safe, I can move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column G, facing right (>). The goal G is directly in front of me at row 08, column H. There is no wall or lava blocking the path, so moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
